summary: The diff implements both REQ-8 and REQ-9 comprehensively. The beforeinstallprompt event is captured early in index.html via an inline script before React loads, stored on window.__installPrompt, and a custom installpromptready event is dispatched. The useInstallPrompt hook reads from window.__installPrompt synchronously on mount. The manifest.json has been updated with valid 192x192 and 512x512 icon entries with separate any and maskable purpose entries, start_url, and display standalone. The service worker sw.js has been bumped to medifind-v2 with corrected promise chaining so skipWaiting and clients.claim run after async operations. All acceptance criteria appear addressed. No hallucinated features detected.
